description_long: This is a robust, industrial-style shelving unit featuring a black metal frame and four wooden shelves. The frame is constructed from thick, rectangular metal tubing, providing structural strength and a utilitarian aesthetic. Each shelf is made of wood planks with a natural finish, contrasting with the dark metal and giving the unit a modern yet rustic appearance. The back of the unit includes a diagonal metal support bar for added stability, while the sides are open, allowing easy access to the shelves. The overall design is open and functional, suitable for storing or displaying items in urban environments such as garages, workshops, or lofts. There are no doors, handles, or enclosed compartments, emphasizing accessibility and practicality.
description: A sturdy, industrial shelving unit with a black metal frame and four natural wood shelves, featuring an open design and a diagonal rear support bar.
description_view_0: Front view showing four wooden shelves framed by black metal, with open access and no doors or handles.
description_view_1: Side view revealing the depth of the shelves and the open, slatted design of the wooden planks.
description_view_2: Rear view highlighting the diagonal metal support bar and the open back structure.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, similar to view 1, showing the open sides and shelf construction.
